commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=8b464046c209c13f9fb501108b953455f40ae326)
commands.review_summary:
The PR makes XML-declaration-only EC2 HTTP 400 provisioning errors retryable as AWS capacity errors and adds AWS classifier regression assertions.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: a wrapped message such as `c7a.8xlarge: aws RunInstances: http 400: <?xml ...?>` can reach the region fallback, and the new anchored regex does not match it. I did not run tests because this was a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Contributor action is needed for a small code/test repair plus after-fix live proof; ClawSweeper should not auto-repair while contributor proof is missing.

target.title: fix(worker): retry opaque AWS RunInstances failures
target.body:
Summary
- Treat opaque AWS EC2 Query HTTP 400 responses during provisioning as retryable capacity failures.
- Keep coded EC2 XML errors on their specific quota/policy/unsupported/fatal paths.
- Add regression assertions for the exact opaque XML-only failures seen from the hosted broker while opening SSH ingress and launching instances, plus guard cases for coded XML bodies.

Verification
- npm test --prefix worker -- aws.test.ts
- npm test --prefix worker -- fleet.test.ts
- npm run check --prefix worker
- npm run format:check --prefix worker
- npm run lint --prefix worker
- git diff --check
- /Users/obviyus/Developer/openclaw/.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main --prompt-file /tmp/crabbox-autoreview-notes.md

Hosted broker proof
- Command run against `https://crabbox.openclaw.ai` with local Crabbox GitHub/broker auth, no local AWS credentials:
  `CRABBOX_CAPACITY_REGIONS=eu-west-1,eu-west-2,eu-central-1,us-east-1,us-west-2 bin/crabbox warmup --provider aws --type c7a.8xlarge --market spot --ttl 12m --idle-timeout 4m --timing-json`
- Current deployed coordinator result before this Worker fix:
  `coordinator POST /v1/leases: http 500: {"error":"eu-west-1: aws AuthorizeSecurityGroupIngress: http 400: <?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\"?>"}`
- This is the same opaque AWS XML-only provisioning failure class. On current deployed code it is unclassified, so region fallback stops at `eu-west-1`. This PR classifies only XML-declaration-only provisioning failures as capacity, allowing the existing fallback loop to continue while preserving coded EC2 XML errors as their real category or fatal.

Notes
- Distill pass kept the fix at the existing AWS provisioning classifier boundary instead of adding separate region-loop branches for each AWS action.
- Autoreview initially caught an overbroad XML fallback; the final patch narrows it to the observed opaque body and the final autoreview run reported no accepted/actionable findings.
target.author: obviyus

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
